baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: You are the builder in a multi-agent loop. STATUS.md contains a completion contract for issue #42. Implement the fix and prepare it for checker.
evals.expected_output: Reads the contract and target files, makes a scoped code/test change in the assigned worktree, runs the narrow relevant check, and updates STATUS.md for checker.
assertions: Stops if no completion contract exists.
Preserves unrelated changes and avoids broad refactors.
Does not approve or verify its own work as final.
